title: Soil survey of ICRISAT farm and type area around Patancheru, Andhra Pradesh
abstract: Chapter one provides the general description of the surveyed area (location and extent, geology, geomorphology and drainage, climate, naturalvegetation and present land use), followed by information on the survey techniques, soil-geomorphic relationship, soil series associations in the type Area and the ICRISAT farm in the 2nd Chapter. Chapter 3 deals with land capability classification, soil survey interpretation for type Area andICRISAT farm and irrigability classification. A description of soil series with analytical data of the typifying pedons is provided in Appendix II.
